title: rubus uncimontanus
intro: Rubus uncimontanus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family native to the Himalayan region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Rubus uncimontanus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Rubus uncimontanus is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and roots are also used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
